appliedUpdates.description: Created user-testing library with CLI testing guidance, concurrency limits (max 5), and flow validator guidance for CLI surface

flowReports.summary: Both worker and checker skill files exist with complete protocol documentation including peer channel tools, verification steps, and check record creation.
CompileWorkerBriefing successfully loads skill files via loadSkillFile and includes content in briefing. Fallback mechanism provides hardcoded contract instructions when files are missing.
All removed attestation functions are gone (no definitions found). Full build/test/vet cycle completes successfully with exit code 0.
Full build-test-install cycle works end-to-end. Worker briefing is coherent, uses 'cogent' CLI name throughout, instructs '--execution-state done', and includes skill loading with fallback.
